---
title: SIG Node Charter
sig: sig-node
---

# SIG Node

Covers the Kubelet and the node-level components that run and manage Pods on a
machine: the Container Runtime Interface (CRI), resource management, cgroups, and the
node lifecycle.

## Scope

SIG Node owns the interaction between Kubernetes and the underlying node, including
resource allocation, the eviction manager, and the CRI API.
